nasb.text: When he came to Samaria, he killed all who remained to Ahab in Samaria, until he had destroyed him, according to the word of the Lord which He spoke to Elijah.

esv.text: And when he came to Samaria, he struck down all who remained to Ahab in Samaria, till he had wiped them out, according to the word of the Lord  that he spoke to Elijah.

cnv.text: 他來到撒瑪利亞，就擊殺亞哈家所有在撒瑪利亞剩下的人，把他們完全消滅，正如耶和華對以利亞所說的話。

ccb.text: 到了撒玛利亚，他把亚哈家在撒玛利亚剩下的人全部杀光，一个不留，应验了耶和华对以利亚说的话。
